name: Server Transfer Skill
description: Stream audio or text payloads into server-side storage and delete one or many streams.

tools.name: stream_audio_to_server
tools.description: Store one audio chunk on the server and optionally finalize the assembled audio stream.

stream_id.description: Stable stream identifier for the audio session.

chunk_base64.description: Base64-encoded audio bytes for this chunk.

mime_type.description: Audio MIME type such as audio/wav or audio/mpeg.

finalize.description: When true, the server assembles all uploaded chunks into one binary file.

metadata.description: Optional stream metadata stored with the manifest.

tools.name: stream_text_to_server
tools.description: Store one text chunk on the server and optionally finalize the assembled text stream.

stream_id.description: Stable stream identifier for the text session.

encoding.description: Encoding label recorded in the manifest.

finalize.description: When true, the server assembles all text chunks into one text file.

metadata.description: Optional stream metadata stored with the manifest.

tools.name: delete_server_streams
tools.description: Delete one stream immediately or delete many streams in one batch request.

mode.description: Delete one stream or many streams.
